Welcome!

I am Fauzan Budi Prasetya, currently studying Master's Data Science in Health at the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA), and supported by a Fulbright scholarship.

I love solving problems to help others reach their goals, especially in digital startups, big tech, e-commerce, and fintech.

Feel free to reach me at fauzan.prasetya@ucla.edu.

Interests

  • Analytics engineer
  • Business intelligence
  • Data science
  • Biostatistics
  • Public health
  • Healthcare
